ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of music the artist performs */,
  "has_piano" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the artist requires a piano for their performance */,
  "headliner" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the artist is a headliner */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the artist */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist's manager */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Special requests made by the artist (e.g., gluten-free food, vegan options) */,
  "twitter" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the artist */,
  "expected_draw" INTEGER /* Expected number of attendees for the artist's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the stage */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stage */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stage */,
  "stage_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stage manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stages_stage_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_manager_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist performing */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stage where the performance will take place */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the performance */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the performance */,
  "sound_engineer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sound engineer */,
  "lighting_technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lighting technician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_sound_engineer_id FOREIGN KEY ("sound_engineer_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_lighting_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("lighting_technician_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment item */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance that requires the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment required (e.g., guitar, drum set, piano) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of equipment required */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "catering" (
  "catering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each catering item */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist requiring catering */,
  "catering_type" TEXT /* Type of catering required (e.g., vegan, gluten-free) */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Special requests made by the artist (e.g., specific snacks, beverages) */,
  "catering_supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the catering supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("catering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_catering_catering_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("catering_supplier_id") REFERENCES catering_suppliers ("catering_supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_catering_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist the manager represents */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managers_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media item */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Instagram, Facebook) */,
  "handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., stage manager, sound engineer) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volunteers" (
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volunteer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the volunteer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the volunteer (e.g., ticket sales, merchandise) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the volunteer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the volunteer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volunteer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sponsor */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of sponsorship provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "catering_suppliers" (
  "catering_supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each catering supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the catering supplier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the catering supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the catering supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the catering supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("catering_supplier_id")
)
